incidents.justification: The chatbot confidently fabricated a company policy, producing false information that users relied on.
Sensitive employee and client information was collected without users knowledge
AI-generated content was presented as authentic, misleading the public and influencing financial decisions.
The model indirectly discriminated against a protected group through proxy features, resulting in unfair hiring outcomes
Biased moderation continued unchecked because no one monitored or reviewed the system's decisions.
Attackers used AI-generated voice impersonation to deceive an employee and compromise the company's financial security.

stretch_notes: On March 31, 2026, Anthropic accidentally leaked the full source code for Claude Code via a misconfigured npm package. This included over 512,000 lines of TypeScript across 1,900+ files.
